title: Vanilla Variants
description: Adds a bit more variants to things that already exist within the game!
body:
![Vanilla Variants Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7affdd724713a9bfd3e51b8998e6bc9189406232.png)

Adds numerous variants of existing blocksets. Along with stairs, slabs, and walls for most stone-based blocks.
![The Wall of Stone Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ffdb750bdabcee4246fcf85ed65d6d4cdb85a3f.png)
New Block variants such as Beams allow for more creative shapes in builds and open the door for some new yet vanilla feeling builds.
![Beam Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b46e25f5da310bab4b9fef8680dcdd1fe1efe2b5.png)
Seats are craftable similar to how beds are and allow the player to sit on them by right clicking.
![Seat Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa77bd7c0f363af60d8b912c7b6bfb202d6b6e61.png)
New Armor/Tool sets for Copper, along with every wood and stone type.
![Copper Tools and Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86466c9c526ba5969e08cbadea84934735358bf3.png)
